title: crateva humblotii
intro: Crateva humblotii, also known as the giant snail tree, is a plant species native to Madagascar, belonging to the family Capparaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The extracts from Crateva humblotii have been found to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, treating gastrointestinal issues, and exhibiting antioxidant and antiviral properties. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, and can also be used as a powder or dried root for medicinal purposes.
